AR1.justification: Routed the user-described recurring pattern to observations.md and explicitly rejected decisions.md because it is a finding, not a commitment that constrains future action.

AR2.justification: n/a — this is not a procedure/runbook scenario, so artifact-binding does not apply; scored 0 as a placeholder since the schema requires an int (aggregation should treat as missing).

AR3.justification: Single in-file append with no cross-references made, so nothing to break; the dated anchor uses ISO format consistent with the methodology.

AR4.justification: Action is an append of a new dated entry to observations.md, which is append-only by design and would not conflict or duplicate on re-run.
